_comment_sizing: 5% of balance per trade — matches Bot Settings Max Position Size slider.
_comment_strategies: 1) Bollinger Squeeze Breakout — low-volatility compression then expansion. 2) VWAP + MACD Momentum — price above/below VWAP with MACD cross confirmation.
_comment_sl_tp: SL = min(2×ATR, Bot Settings SL%). TP = max(3.5×ATR, Bot Settings TP%). Trailing stop if enabled in Bot Settings.
notes: v3: BB Squeeze Breakout + VWAP/MACD Momentum. ATR-based SL/TP with hard limits. No arbitrary time limits. Works on MCX bullion (09:00-23:30 IST) and energy (09:00-23:55 IST) — check MCX schedule.
